summary: Iteration 111: Series/Anime Release and Poster Generation Bug Fixes - All 17 backend tests PASSED. Verified all fixes: 1) number_of_images=1 used instead of n=1, 2) No b64_json references (raw bytes used), 3) Single consolidated DB update in release_series, 4) 60s timeout on frontend release call, 5) Release event generation working for both TV series and anime.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Both Series TV and Anime pipelines load correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: All series/anime release and poster generation fixes verified. Key findings: 1) series_pipeline.py uses number_of_images=1 at lines 191 and 861 (not n=1). 2) No b64_json references - images returned as raw bytes. 3) release_series function has only ONE db.tv_series.update_one call (consolidated). 4) Frontend SeriesTVPipeline.jsx has 60s timeout at line 221 for release call. 5) Release events (SERIES_EVENTS and ANIME_EVENTS) are properly generated. Active series in pipeline: 'SCHIACCIAPENSIERI' (TV, casting phase), 'TEST_GUESTSTARANIME' (Anime, screenplay phase).

notes: All bug fixes verified through code review, API tests, and UI tests. The series/anime release and poster generation system is working correctly. Both TV series and anime pipelines are functional with proper release event generation.
